latest.title: Morning Run
latest.signalHeadline: Easy on paper, costlier in practice
latest.signalSummary: The run still counts as aerobic work, but it asked for more than a true easy slot should.
latest.blockStructure: Continuous aerobic running, with a few uneven patches that broke the rhythm.

cardiacDrift.label: Moderate drift
cardiacDrift.note: Heart rate rose through the second half without a cheaper pace profile.

heatImpact.label: Warm but manageable
heatImpact.note: Conditions added a little load, but they were not the whole story.

gpsConfidence.label: Mostly clean
gpsConfidence.note: Route and lap data look stable enough for a confident broad read.

latest.carryForward: Bring the next aerobic run back under control and let the heart rate sit lower.

nextRunSuggestion.title: Quiet aerobic run
nextRunSuggestion.summary: Keep the effort below this session's cost and use it to restore rhythm.
